channel.title: Spring Lake Surf Conditions — Remsen Ave
channel.description: Daily 7-day surf forecast for Remsen Ave & Ocean Ave N, Spring Lake, NJ

item.title: 7-Day Surf Forecast — 2026-06-21 to 2026-06-27
item.description: 0 IDEAL, 2 INTERESTING, 5 NOT IDEAL over the next 7 days. 2026-06-21: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 1.8 ft @ 6.2 sec, wind 3 kt SW. Low tide: 07:10, 19:37. 2026-06-22: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 1.6 ft @ 5.7 sec, wind 3 kt E. Low tide: 08:04, 20:40. 2026-06-23: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 3.4 ft @ 5.7 sec, wind 7 kt SE. Low tide: 08:55, 21:38. 2026-06-24: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 14:00, 1.9 ft @ 6.5 sec, wind 4 kt NW. Low tide: 09:43, 22:30. 2026-06-25: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 1.7 ft @ 6.8 sec, wind 4 kt W. Low tide: 10:28, 23:17. 2026-06-26: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.1 ft @ 5.4 sec, wind 9 kt SSW. Low tide: 11:12. 2026-06-27: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.2 ft @ 6.0 sec, wind 4 kt NNW. Low tide: 00:03, 11:55.
item.content:encoded:
0 IDEAL, 2 INTERESTING, 5 NOT IDEAL over the next 7 days.

  • 2026-06-21: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 1.8 ft @ 6.2 sec, wind 3 kt SW. Low tide: 07:10, 19:37.
  • 2026-06-22: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 1.6 ft @ 5.7 sec, wind 3 kt E. Low tide: 08:04, 20:40.
  • 2026-06-23: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 3.4 ft @ 5.7 sec, wind 7 kt SE. Low tide: 08:55, 21:38.
  • 2026-06-24: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 14:00, 1.9 ft @ 6.5 sec, wind 4 kt NW. Low tide: 09:43, 22:30.
  • 2026-06-25: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 1.7 ft @ 6.8 sec, wind 4 kt W. Low tide: 10:28, 23:17.
  • 2026-06-26: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.1 ft @ 5.4 sec, wind 9 kt SSW. Low tide: 11:12.
  • 2026-06-27: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.2 ft @ 6.0 sec, wind 4 kt NNW. Low tide: 00:03, 11:55.
